title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 30.830 - Program funding limitation
text:
30.830.  Program funding limitation. — The state treasurer may utilize up to sixty million dollars of the three hundred thirty million dollar linked deposit allocation for agriculture set forth in subsection 1 of section 30.753 for linked deposits for eligible guaranteed agribusinesses, eligible guaranteed livestock operations, and eligible guaranteed vermiculture operations.
(L. 1997 H.B. 557, A.L. 2005 S.B. 270, A.L. 2006 H.B. 1739)
